subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Beloved! I know not by what tongue I may raise aloft the banners of Thy remembrance and hoist the standards of Thy glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فیا الهی و محبوبی لم ادر بای لسان ارفع اعلام ذکرک و ارتفع رایات عزک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @power of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
